title: Luxuriant Gooey Algerian Toor Dal
description: A rich and gooey Algerian dish featuring toor dal, perfect for a brunch mood, with a unique tempering chocolate twist, plant-based friendly.
instructions: Rinse the toor dal and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soaked toor dal and 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until the dal is cooked and gooey.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Stir the melted chocolate into the cooked dal and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
